title: ISR Systems and Architectures
text:
After college, I wanted to work with a great team on interesting projects that have real-world impact; I cannot think of a better place than the Laboratory for this type of career.
James Clifford
Systems Analyst
ISR Systems and Technology
ISR Systems and Architectures
I was drawn to this role because of how interdisciplinary it is and how I get to step back and have a big-picture idea of technical concepts.
Grace Remillard
Systems Analyst
ISR Systems and Technology
ISR Systems and Architectures
I greatly appreciate the Laboratory's collaborative spirit and easy access to world experts in all areas of science and technology, and I believe fostering a fun, collegial environment is key to successful working groups.
Lauren Scott
Systems Analyst
Tactical Systems
ISR Systems and Architectures
I really enjoy helping our government sponsors understand the key technical information they need to make informed decisions.
Christina Epstein
Systems Analyst
Tactical Systems
ISR Systems and Architectures
